title: Built Crosslake Cabins from Scratch
description: Achieved a lifelong goal of owning property on Crosslake — not just one cabin, but three, all generating rental income at ~$600/night. What started as a dream became a profitable real estate portfolio built from nothing.

title: $300K Sales Month at Woodchuck
description: After a sluggish six months, personally drove over $300K in sales in a single month, proving he could still produce at an elite level when it mattered most.

title: Nature Link Profitable in Year One
description: Built a resort from the ground up and made it profitable already in its first operating period — a rare feat for any hospitality startup.

title: Living in a $2M Home at 33
description: Self-made, no inheritance, no trust fund — a farm boy who built enough wealth to live in a $2 million home with a million dollars in equity by age 33.

title: Hired First Integrator (Nettie)
description: Made the leap to bring on an Integrator to run day-to-day operations at Woodchuck, freeing himself to operate as a true Visionary for the first time.

title: Net Worth Over $10M at 33
description: Accumulated a net worth exceeding $10 million by age 33 through relentless work ethic, smart real estate plays, and building two companies.

title: 4-Day Sprinter Van Adventure
description: Took a transformative solo/buddy trip dirt biking in Moab, mountain biking in Big Bear, and surfing in California. Had a breakthrough revelation that the next chapter of life CAN be better than the last.

title: "This Life Can Be Better Than the Last"
description: Sitting on top of the sprinter van watching the sunset in California, had a pivotal mindset shift — stopped grieving the old life and embraced designing an even better new chapter with family.

title: First Men's Leadership Retreat
description: Hosted 22 high-caliber men at his own resort for a leadership retreat he had dreamed about for years. Friends flew in from NYC and Colorado to attend.

title: Annual Planning at His Own Resort
description: Led a full business planning day for his Woodchuck leadership team at the resort he built, then sat in the sauna listening to Tony Robbins — a living cookie jar moment he recognized in real time.

title: Hired a Life Coach (Johan)
description: Invested in coaching that helped re-wire his mindset, address cynicism, develop high-level leadership skills, and find alignment with his gifts.

title: The "Crack Day" — Most Aligned Work Day Ever
description: Had a day working on M&A deals and Nature Link financing that felt like being on 40mg of Adderall — pure alignment with his gifts as a visionary, connector, and deal-maker.

title: Two Multi-Million Dollar Companies by 34
description: Built two separate multi-million dollar companies in 10 years — Woodchuck and Nature Link — as a self-made entrepreneur.

title: Flying Family to California with a Nanny
description: Flew Zoie, Kinney, and their full-time nanny to a rented house in Manhattan Beach to work/play for a week — living the life they had dreamed about since dating.

title: Got $150K Back from Matt
description: After months of stress and broken promises, recovered $150,000 of a $250K loan — a tangible win after an incredibly difficult financial and friendship situation.

title: Found Jesus as His Ultimate Role Model
description: After years of searching for a flawless mentor, had a profound realization in a shower in Peru that Jesus is the perfect leadership role model — for fatherhood, vision-casting, and servant leadership.

title: EO Forum Transformation in Peru
description: Stood up in his EO forum and challenged the group to elevate, using coaching tools to articulate his vision. Was told it changed the forum's direction for the better.

title: Flying His Parents Home
description: Fulfilled a long-held dream of flying his parents home in a private plane (Cirrus SR22) from the resort — combining aviation, family, and the fruits of his labor.

title: Zoie Pregnant with Second Child
description: While sitting at the resort he built, with a profitable business, having just flown his parents home — learned Zoie was pregnant again. A moment of pure gratitude.

title: Scouting Nature Link Location #2
description: Flew to Bozeman, Montana to evaluate properties for a second Nature Link resort, stepping fully into his vision of building a chain of nature-focused resorts.

title: Identified His Brand Identity
description: After deep coaching work, crystallized his identity as a 'Tenacious, Visionary Builder' — someone who builds businesses, creates profits, and cares about positive planetary impact.

title: Overcame the Cynicism Ceiling
description: Recognized that his cynical mindset — assuming employees winning meant the company losing — was the ceiling keeping his companies small. Committed to rewiring toward win-win thinking.

title: Defined Kingdom vs. Empire Building
description: Developed his core leadership philosophy: 'You can't build a great kingdom without great people. You can't keep great people without treating them great.'

title: Core Responsibilities Framework
description: Through a painful season of losses, learned and implemented clear core responsibilities with real accountability for every team member — a framework he'll use for life.

title: Nature Link $100K Monthly Profit
description: Nature Link hit $100K in bottom-line profit in a single month and was on track to repeat it — the resort business proving its massive potential.

title: Woodchuck $21M in 6 Months
description: At the peak, ran a company of 300+ people that did $21 million in revenue in just 6 months — proof of his ability to scale.

title: Published Author and Paid Speaker
description: Wrote and launched a book, then commanded $15,000 for a 1.5-hour keynote speech — building a platform and personal brand from scratch.

title: Planted Trees on All 7 Continents
description: Traveled to every continent on the planet to plant trees through Woodchuck's giving program, gaining life-changing perspective and planting partners across the globe.

title: Survived Dangerous Situations Abroad
description: Threatened with weapons in multiple countries, nearly arrested by corrupt officials in Africa, brought to mugging zones — and came through it all stronger with proof that kindness outnumbers evil worldwide.

title: Invited to Jet Share Program
description: Through networking, was invited into an exclusive jet share program with a $250K buy-in — a dream carried for years and validation of the circles he had built his way into.

title: Woodchuck Profitable Two Consecutive Months
description: After struggling seasons, Woodchuck turned profitable for two consecutive months with the integrator in place, proving the operating model could work.

title: Zoie Got Into WPO
description: Supported and encouraged Zoie to surround herself with a high-caliber network, and she earned membership in the Women Presidents' Organization — a huge milestone for her growth.

title: 3+ Years of Emergency Cash Reserves
description: Built up approximately 3 years of cash reserves while running two companies — financial discipline that provided stability through storms.

title: $24K Rent Payback from Woodchuck
description: After forgoing rent payments to support the company, Woodchuck paid back all the deferred rent — $24,000 he hadn't expected to see.

title: Machu Picchu with EO Forum
description: Hiked Machu Picchu mountain with his EO forum brothers on a trip to Peru for his 34th birthday — combining adventure, brotherhood, and personal growth.

title: Motorcycle Trip — Desert to Coast
description: 3-day motorcycle trip with Charlie through the California desert, up the coast, and through Palm Springs — discovering the DRIFT hotel and having massive life epiphanies.

title: Built a $12M Resort from Scratch
description: Took Nature Link from concept to a $12 million resort — designed, developed, and built in about a year. An asset he owns and operates.

title: Zoie as Director of Sales
description: Through a difficult season at Woodchuck, Zoie stepped up as Director of Sales and became someone he could fully trust to run the sales operation — a major win for their partnership.

title: Defined His Friendship Values
description: After the painful Matt situation, created a clear values framework for friendships (Growth mindset, Loyal, Honest/Vulnerable, Integrity, Adventure) and committed to never settling for less.

title: Survived Lending $250K to a Friend
description: Made a painful $250K loan to a friend, learned the hard lesson about never lending more than you can lose, but came through it with marriage intact and wisdom gained.

title: Cat Skiing in Fernie on a Private Jet
description: Invited on an all-expenses-paid cat skiing trip in Fernie with high-net-worth mentors, flying back on a King Air. Had deep conversations and potential investment interest in Nature Link.

title: Found Authentic High-Level Mentors
description: Connected deeply with Eric and Lonnie — smart, hard-working, humble men who grew up poor and built empires. Found role models he could be real with.

title: Woodchuck Q1 2025: $250K Net Profit
description: After a brutal 2024 of losses and restructuring, Woodchuck came roaring back with over $250K in net profit in Q1 2025 — proof that the turnaround worked.

title: Crosslake Cabin Flip: $638K Profit
description: Bought the Crosslake cabins for ~$530K, invested ~$150K, and sold for a price that netted $638K in profit in about 5 years.

title: Closed on $2M Silver Sands Cabin
description: At 35, closed on a $2M lakefront cabin that would break even on rentals, save $470K+ in taxes, and become the family's peaceful sanctuary.

title: Nearly $2M Net Profit Across All Companies
description: By September 2025, generated almost $2M in net profit across all three companies with 4 months still remaining in the year.

title: Reverse 1031 Exchange Execution
description: Successfully executed a complex reverse 1031 exchange — buying the new property first, then selling Crosslake — saving hundreds of thousands in taxes.

title: First $200K Fabrication Projects
description: Closed the first $200K in projects with PD Instore for a new fabrication business line — a potentially massive new sector for Woodchuck's future.

title: Best Company Presentation Ever — Toronto
description: Zoie and he delivered the best pitch presentation Woodchuck has ever given to Gateway in Toronto — dialed, confident, potentially game-changing for the company's trajectory.

title: $15M+ Net Worth by Age 35
description: Built over $15 million in net worth in 5 years through businesses, real estate, and disciplined wealth building — all self-made from a farm background.

title: Fastest Growing Resort in the Midwest
description: Nature Link was on track to be one of the fastest-growing resorts in the Midwest — validating the entire vision and business model.

title: Won Midnight Pickleball Championship
description: Won the midnight pickleball championship at his own men's retreat with Gary — a small, fun win that represents the culture of competitive fun he builds everywhere.

title: 40-Man Men's Retreat at Nature Link
description: Scaled the men's retreat from 22 to 40 high-caliber men in year two, with a full sign-up list for the next one. Created a space where even the 'big dogs' got vulnerable.

title: Turned Woodchuck Around from $20K/Week Losses
description: When Woodchuck was hemorrhaging $20K/week, made the hard calls on restructuring, accountability, and team changes to stop the bleeding and return to profitability.

title: Ran a Company of 300+ People
description: Scaled Woodchuck to over 300 employees — proving he could build and manage at significant scale, even if the next chapter required different skills.

title: $100M Vision for Woodchuck
description: Cast a BHAG vision for Woodchuck as a $100M company with diversified verticals — the premier stop for wood products worldwide.

title: Joined The Nature Conservancy Board
description: Earned a seat on the TNC board, attending retreats with billionaires and expanding his network at the highest levels of conservation and business.

title: Cabo Trip with Zoie — Reconnection
description: Took a magical 3.5-day trip to Cabo with Zoie and friends — adventured, snorkeled, and reconnected. A reminder that the grind is worth it for moments like these.

title: Started Vistage — Leveled Up Advisory
description: Made the strategic decision to join Vistage ($25K/year), combining mentorship, peer groups, and business tools into one cohesive program.

title: Flying Dad to Work and Appointments
description: During his father's health decline, spent quality time driving his dad to appointments and working alongside him — choosing family over efficiency when every moment counted.

title: Embraced "Simplify and Elevate" for 2026
description: After a challenging 2025, crystallized his approach: simplify the businesses, elevate quality of life, and prioritize adventure with family.

title: Motorcycle Trip Up California Coast
description: Rode 20+ hours of motorcycle up some of the most beautiful coastline in the world, reconnecting with God, faith, and purpose. Came back recharged and clear.

title: Tariff Opportunity — American Manufacturing
description: When 25% tariffs hit Mexico and Canada, immediately recognized the massive competitive advantage for Woodchuck's domestic manufacturing — even reaching out to competitors.

title: Zoie's Mental Health Breakthrough
description: After years of supporting Zoie through mental health struggles, she found a counselor and committed to a sabbatical — his patience and support kept the marriage strong.

title: Farm Boy Flying Private Jets
description: Multiple journal entries written from private planes, resort porches, and beachfront locations — a recurring reminder that the kid who started with nothing built a life most people only dream about.
